subcategory.title: Minigolf
subcategory.description: Book your next minigolf outing here. Minigolf is a name for all types of course golf and is a leisure activity for the whole family, with friends or colleagues. You need skill in the first place. The ball is first placed in a prescribed teeing area. Now the goal is to get the ball into the hole in as few strokes as possible. The equipment consists of a club and a ball. The course systems used vary, but usually a complete round consists of 18 holes.
